findings.title: Release credentials are exposed to an untrusted execution path
findings.description: A deliberately long imported finding description confirms that the viewer preserves readable wrapping for evidence-heavy reports instead of truncating or hiding important diagnostic detail at narrow and desktop widths.

evidence.message: The imported fixture carries a long blocker evidence message for visibility testing.

findings.recommendation: Remove the credential path before release.

findings.title: Critical customer route emits a console exception
findings.description: The long description verifies that a high-severity imported record remains inspectable after browser-side schema validation and local-only loading.

evidence.message: Console exception persisted in the browser evidence fixture.

findings.title: Primary navigation lacks a visible focus transition
findings.description: This medium-severity record makes the state matrix exercise another distinct severity while retaining the full text.

evidence.message: Focusable control state did not visibly change.

findings.title: Social image alt text is incomplete
findings.description: This low-severity record confirms that full content and recommendations render consistently across imported records.

evidence.message: Open Graph image alt text omitted context.

findings.recommendation: Add descriptive social image alt text.

findings.title: Optional accessibility path was not exercised
findings.description: This informational record completes the five-severity fixture and confirms long imported copy stays available in the report viewer.

evidence.message: Optional path intentionally remains outside the fixture run.

findings.recommendation: Schedule the optional path for a later audit.

notes: Imported fixture preserves all coverage notes in browser memory.
No execution command is part of this local report import.
